sections.paragraph: Chald. plur. emphat. lawyers, persons learned in the law, Dan 3:2, . (Arab. Conj. IV. افتى to give an answer concerning the law, whence الُغتِى Mufti, prop. wise man, whose answer is almost the same as law.) Bertholdt (on Daniel, page 828) explains it, governors of provinces, from פְּתַי, פְּתָאָת level region. Theod. οἱ ἐπʼ ἐξουσιῶν. Vulg. prœfecti.
